sentences.arabic: كِتَابُ "كَلِيلَة وَدِمْنَة" هُوَ مَجْمُوعَةٌ مِنَ الْقِصَصِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Knjiga "Kalila i Dimna" je zbirka starih priča.
sentences.translationEn: The book 'Kalila and Dimna' is a collection of ancient stories.

sentences.arabic: تَتَحَدَّثُ الْحَيَوَانَاتُ فِي هَذِهِ الْقِصَصِ مِثْلَ الْبَشَرِ.
sentences.translation: Životinje u ovim pričama govore poput ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: Animals in these stories talk like humans.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الْقَارِئُ مِنْهَا حِكَمًا وَأَخْلَاقًا كَثِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Čitalac iz njih uči mnoge mudrosti i moralne pouke.
sentences.translationEn: The reader learns many wisdoms and morals from them.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الْأَطْفَالُ وَالْكِبَارُ قِرَاءَةَ هَذِهِ الْحِكَايَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca i odrasli vole čitati ove priče.
sentences.translationEn: Children and adults love reading these tales.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تُسَاعِدُنَا عَلَى فَهْمِ الْحَيَاةِ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: One nam pomažu da bolje razumijemo život.
sentences.translationEn: They help us understand life better.
